en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.
A: Please sit down.

ab: djavadjavay a masantalj. uri temulu aken a nu sinsi tua patjara kakanen, sa anemaya a penaiwanan?
ch: 大家好。今天你們的老師我要教大家關於食物的排灣語說法。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say Paiwanese for food.
A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: kemeljang sun tua anemayamaya aken a su sinsi?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: sinsi, ini aken a pulingalingaw. pai qaqivuanan a puita.
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ini aken a lemadenga, pai tjapasiqacauanan!
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: pacunu a pasamaza! kicuali aken a semupu a puita!
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: A: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.

ab: pai kituluanan a puitaanga. tjapasiqacauanan dri!
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.

ab: sinsi, dremaudrav aken a kemacu tua ku inepic.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: sinsi, ini aken a paqenetj a kemacu tua ku inepic.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: sinsi, dremaudrav aken a kemacu tua ku siquliqulip.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: sinsi, ini aken a paqenetj a kemacu tua ku siquliqulip.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: pai, kisedjamu tua su sapitjan tua siquliqulip.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: pasedjami aken tua su siquliqulip ui?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.
Class is over.

ab: tjaljumazai tua tja kitulu, cevucevungianga nu tjaivililj a tucu a qadavan!
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
